# go-knifer

> Go utility library organized as public `v*` facade packages backed by implementation packages under `internal/`.

## Project layout

- `v*/`: importable facade packages for users.
- `internal/`: implementation packages shared by facades.
- `bin/`: repository validation scripts.
- `docs/`: project documentation and API stability artifacts.
- `.github/workflows/`: CI and release automation.

## Validation commands

- `make ci-test`: module verification, vet, tidy/diff checks, architecture checks, race/shuffle tests, coverage gate, and exported API snapshot check.
- `make check`: local full gate, including lint and vulnerability scan.
- `UPDATE_API=1 make api-check`: refresh the root-package and top-level `v*` exported API snapshot after intentional public API changes.

## Governance notes

- Keep package tests split by source-file responsibility.
- Keep production code free of forbidden panic patterns checked by `bin/check_arch.sh`.
- Keep total coverage above the threshold enforced by `bin/check_coverage.sh`.
